content.text:
<user_query>
Verify the CURRENT live deployment state for BIQc prod and dev using CLI commands, and return exact values.

Repository path: C:/Users/andre/.cursor/worktrees/Version2-Ai_Mentor/tpn

Collect:
1) Azure webapp image refs (linuxFxVersion) for:
   - biqc-web
   - biqc-web-dev
   - biqc-api
   - biqc-api-dev
2) ACR tags for biqc-frontend and biqc-backend (top recent tags).
3) Supabase functions status where possible (at least verify browse-ai-reviews deployability/current endpoint response shape for both prod/dev refs).
4) Quick HTTP probes:
   - https://biqc.ai
   - https://biqc-web-dev.azurewebsites.net
   - https://biqc.ai/calibration
   - https://biqc-web-dev.azurewebsites.net/calibration

Return a compact factual report with command outputs summarized. Do not edit files.
</user_query>
Gathering Azure web app configs, ACR tags, and HTTP probe results. Searching the repo for resource group and ACR names, then running Azure CLI and curl.
